voice_profile: Royal Cyber Kingdom Voice (Friendly, Elegant, Encouraging)

scripts.guide_opening: Greetings! Welcome to our Royal Cyber Garden. I'm Dragon Kid. Let's explore the wonders of English in our Kingdom! Tap the magic gate to enter!
scripts.apple: Apple. A sweet gift from our royal orchard.
scripts.banana: Banana. A golden treasure from the sun.
scripts.lion: Lion. The brave guardian of our kingdom.
scripts.elephant: Elephant. The gentle giant of the cyber wild.
scripts.success: Splendid! A gift from nature! You've earned a royal star sugar!
scripts.red: Red! Bold and brave, like the dragon's heart!
scripts.blue: Blue! Deep and calm, like our royal ocean.
scripts.yellow: Yellow! Bright and warm, like the sun over our kingdom.
scripts.green: Green! Full of life, like our emerald forests.
scripts.purple: Purple! Noble and wise, the color of our crown.
scripts.circle: A Circle! Round and smooth, like the palace wheels.
scripts.square: A Square! Strong and steady, like our castle walls.
scripts.triangle: A Triangle! Sharp and fast, like an arrow of light.
scripts.star: A Star! Bright and shining, like the cyber sky.
scripts.father: This is Father. He is strong and wise, the protector of our home.
scripts.mother: This is Mother. She is gentle and kind, the moonlight of our kingdom.
scripts.brother: This is Brother. He is energetic and smart, your best playmate!
scripts.sister: This is Sister. She is sweet and clever, a little princess of our garden.
